title: Scientific gallery — the 9 ML kinds
description: PCA, clustering and model-evaluation charts. Every chart is real data computed in the demo generator.

blocks.text:
## 3D & surfaces

Drag to rotate. `scatter3d` is the PCA/t-SNE/UMAP workhorse; `surface` and `contour` share the same `{x, y, z}` grid contract.

blocks.title: PCA — three components
blocks.description: Three gaussian blobs, coloured by cluster. (kind: scatter3d)

blocks.title: Loss landscape
blocks.description: z = f(learning rate, weight decay). (kind: surface)

blocks.title: Same landscape, from above
blocks.description: Filled iso-contours over the identical grid. (kind: contour)

blocks.text:
## Distributions

`violin` and `errorBars` are the two kinds ECharts could not express at all under a JSON-only contract.

blocks.title: Embedding density
blocks.description: 2D KDE contours with the raw points overlaid. (kind: density)

blocks.title: Latency by service
blocks.description: Distribution per group, with an inner box. (kind: violin)

blocks.title: Learning curve
blocks.description: Train vs validation accuracy, shaded ±1 std. (kind: errorBars)

blocks.text:
## Clustering

`dendrogram` takes a scipy-style linkage: each row merges two children, where `"#i"` refers back to merge `i`.

blocks.title: Hierarchical clustering
blocks.description: Bracket height is merge distance. (kind: dendrogram)

blocks.title: Silhouette
blocks.description: Sorted per cluster; the dashed line is the mean. (kind: silhouette)

blocks.title: Component pairs
blocks.description: Lower-triangle scatter matrix, coloured by cluster. (kind: splom)
